rationale: Multiple scheduled tasks were created using schtasks.exe and PowerShell, some with 'cmd.exe /c calc.exe' as the action, and one with a hardcoded password (A0, EV-001, EV-002, EV-003, EV-004). While these tasks were subsequently deleted (EV-005, EV-006, EV-007, EV-008, EV-009), the initial creation of persistence mechanisms, especially with a hardcoded password, is highly suspicious and indicative of potential reconnaissance or testing by an attacker.
